name: Grilled Beef Kabobs 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the marinade by combining lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, oil, soy sauce, mustard, and minced garlic.
2. Cut the beef into 1-inch chunks, then place it in the marinade. Cover and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 12 hours or more.
3. Cut the vegetables (green pepper, mushrooms, cherry tomatoes, and onion) into chunks, making sure to have at least 8 pieces of each.
4. Remove the beef cubes from the marinade, reserving the marinade for basting.
5. On four medium or long skewers, alternate pieces of meat and vegetables.
6. Grill over hot coals, basting occasionally with the reserved marinade. Cook for about 15 minutes, turning the skewers regularly.
- Allow an additional 5 to 10 minutes of cooking time if you prefer well-done meat.
7. Serve hot. Makes 4 servings.
